body_txt: Version-Exclusive Content is the practice of making certain content in a Video Game exclusive to particular versions or players. The exclusive content is not mandatory for completing the base game, just for a player's 100% Completion . This is usually done for one of a few reasons: Can overlap with an Updated Re-release (and its region-specific subtrope, Regional Bonus ) since any rerelease can be expected to have exclusive features that were not in the original version(s). See also Reformulated Game for when the actual underlying game is different between its versions, Version-Exclusive Boss for when entire boss fights are different between its versions, and Polished Port . (For sake of brevity, this list does not include content added solely by an Updated Re-release or Regional Bonus . It does include content removed by a re-release, and thereby retroactively made exclusive to an earlier version.)
